data.title: Peoples Ltd. reports Q3 2025 net income of $3,012,000. CEO announces results for the holding company of PS Bank.
data.description: In Wyalusing, Pennsylvania on October 23, 2025, Peoples Ltd. (OTC: PPLL) reported their third quarter 2025 results. Anthony J. Gabello, President and CEO of Peoples Ltd., the holding company for PS Bank, disclosed a net income of $3,012,000 for the quarter.
15 counterparties take $6.941b at Fed Reverse Repo Operation.

data.title: Investor deadline nearing for KBR claims. Contact Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP if bought securities between May 6, 2025 to June 19, 2025.
data.description: Investors who experienced losses in KBR are urged by Securities Litigation Partner James (Josh) Wilson of Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP to reach out directly to him to explore potential courses of action. If you bought or obtained securities in KBR during the period from May 6, 2025, to June 19, 2025, and wish to review your legal choices, please contact Mr. Wilson for assistance.

data.title: Inventor from Lehigh Acres, Fla. creates Protective Shield (NPL-770) to prevent child injuries, inspired by childcare work.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on October 23, 2025, a childcare worker from Lehigh Acres, Florida, identified a need for a safer environment for young children. This led to the invention of a solution aimed at preventing finger injuries typically caused by getting them pinched in the gap between doors and door frames. The inventor emphasized the importance of a simple yet effective method to protect children, highlighting the potential risks. The innovation addresses this concern, aiming to reduce such incidents and enhance overall child safety.

data.title: MGIC Investment Corp. (NYSE: MTG) declares $0.15/share quarterly dividend, payable Nov. 20, 2025, to shareholders of record as of Nov. 6, 2025.
data.description: MGIC Investment Corporation (NYSE: MTG) based in Milwaukee, disclosed the approval of a quarterly cash dividend of $0.15 per share by its Board of Directors. The payment is scheduled for November 20, 2025, for shareholders on record as of November 6, 2025. MGIC, a leading provider of mortgage insurance, continues its commitment to providing value to its shareholders through this dividend declaration.

data.title: BillingPlatform ranked as a leader in Gartner Magic Quadrant for recurring billing apps, with highest scores in 3 use cases.
data.description: BillingPlatform, a leading enterprise revenue lifecycle management platform, has attained top scores in three out of five key use cases in the Critical Capabilities Report. The company excelled in areas such as Complex Usage Billing, Mixed Billing, and Enterprise Grade Billing. Renowned for its innovative solutions, BillingPlatform continues to showcase its expertise in delivering exceptional services to businesses.

data.title: Arthrolense partners with Waldemar Link to advance machine vision in orthopedic surgery, introducing 4Di system.
data.description: A medical technology company, Arthrolense™, based in Toronto, has revealed a new alliance with Germany's Waldemar Link GmbH & Co. KG. The partnership aims to introduce their advanced technologies to the orthopedic sector. This collaboration involves the integration of Arthrolense's cutting-edge Arthrolense 4Di™ visual guidance system with Link's primary knee system. The agreement, while non-exclusive, signifies a significant step towards innovation in orthopedic surgical guidance. Through this partnership, both companies seek to expand their reach and offer enhanced solutions to the orthopedic community.

data.title: HR Policy Association rebrands to CHRO Association to align with member priorities. Effective Oct. 23, 2025. Source: PRNewswire.
data.description: An announcement was made in Washington on October 23, 2025, that the HR Policy Association has been re-branded to the CHRO Association (chro.org). This change is effective immediately and is aimed at aligning with the evolving priorities of its members. The CHRO Association focuses on advancing workforce policy and practice to drive business success. This initiative represents a significant shift for the association, with a membership comprising of important stakeholders such as Chief Human Resources Officers (CHROs) and other senior HR executives. The association aims to address key challenges and opportunities in the current HR landscape. For more information, visit chro.org.

data.title: Binance founder CZ pardoned by Trump for anti-money laundering violations, ending 'war on crypto'.
data.description: Changpeng "CZ" Zhao, co-founder of Binance, found guilty of breaking U.S. anti-money laundering regulations, has received clemency from President Donald Trump. White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt revealed Trump's use of pardon powers for Zhao, criticizing the "Biden Administration's crackdown on crypto." Reports suggest Trump signed the pardon on Wednesday, showing empathy for allegations of Zhao facing political persecution.
TESLA SHARES EXTEND GAINS; LAST UP 2.1%

If you bought or obtained securities in LifeMD within the period from May 7, 2025, to August 5, 2025, and are interested in exploring your options, Wilson encourages you to contact him to discuss further.

data.title: AutoNation stock falls as Q3 earnings beat estimates: EPS $5.01 (25% YoY), sales $7.037B (7% increase).
data.description: AutoNation, Inc. (NYSE: AN) saw its shares decline following the release of its third-quarter financial results. The company reported adjusted earnings per share of $5.01, marking a 25% increase compared to the same period last year and surpassing the analyst estimate of $4.82. Quarterly sales reached $7.037 billion, exceeding the expected $6.86 billion. The company experienced a 7% increase in revenue, driven by growth in all key categories. For more information, the complete article can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Binance founder challenges Peter Schiff's tokenized gold project, calling it "trust-me-bro" asset. Supports Bitcoin.
data.description: Binance (CRYPTO: BNB) founder Changpeng "CZ" Zhao challenged economist Peter Schiff's tokenized gold project as not being truly on-chain and labeled it a "trust-me-bro" asset in the ongoing Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) versus gold debate. Schiff introduced a blockchain-based tokenized gold platform under his company Shift Gold, enabling users to purchase, store, transfer digitally, or redeem for physical bullion via a mobile app. Schiff believes tokenized gold on the blockchain adds stability and physical backing to digital assets, providing an alternative to Bitcoin's volatility. CZ's criticism came after Schiff's announcement; the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Prospanica acquires Techqueria to empower Latino professionals nationwide, uniting business and technology. Expanding reach.
data.description: Prospanica has taken a significant move by broadening its scope to include the country's top Latino tech community. The Association of Hispanic MBAs and Business Professionals, based in Dallas, revealed on October 23, 2025, that they have finalized a deal to incorporate this community.

data.title: Putin criticizes U.S. sanctions as "unfriendly" and vows Russia won't yield. Warns of retaliation if Kyiv is armed.
data.description: Russian President Vladimir V. Putin has cautioned against the Trump administration's intention to provide Kyiv with potent missiles, threatening a strong retaliation in response.
Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt Briefs Members of the Media, Oct. 23, 2025
